summary: Harden stabilization remediation for DB replica failures and improve runbook job execution reliability

changes.description: Add db_replica_healthcheck_status and db_replica_healthcheck_repair runbooks, wire them into the stabilization cycle before db_replica_repair, and expose clearer stabilization step/check labels in status output.
Harden runSwarmJob create/poll/cleanup behavior and disable image healthchecks for short-lived database runbook jobs so probe and repair jobs are not marked unhealthy by container-level checks.
